_comment: Single source of truth for the skills index. AGENTS.md is rendered from this manifest. doctor.ps1 verifies every entry's path/entrypoint exists. tools/build-snapshot.ps1 uses ship_in_snapshot to decide what goes in the public template. Surface tier: 'engine' = team-management surface, ships in template default; 'example' = personal-life reference (e.g. Partner, Pilates); 'local-only' = local-install carve-outs (e.g. forwarders) that the public template should NOT carry. show_in_agents controls visibility in the AGENTS.md skills table. category groups skills in the rendered AGENTS.md table; valid values: 'sprint-pbis', 'comms', 'codebase-people', 'reviews-dri', 'cadence-memory', 'private-work-tools', 'personal-life', 'hidden' (used only when show_in_agents=false). role is the higher-level role-agent a skill belongs to (the Nirvana Explorer groups skills by role); valid values: 'chief-of-staff', 'sprint-delivery', 'reliability-dri', 'code-knowledge', 'comms-agent', 'personal-life'.

skills.name: sprint-digest
skills.summary: Weekly Nir-only schedule-slippage email for the current iteration (Your Team), distinct from sprint-report-daily (a daily markdown file) and semester-plan-report (Feature/PBI leadership dashboard). Pulls the active sprint from ADO, classifies Task+Bug items, and reports pace as working-day elapsed % vs work-done %, in BOTH current scope and baseline scope (IDs snapshotted on the first run of the iteration, so added/removed work is visible). Includes a pace verdict ribbon (On track / Behind / Well behind), a Not-started table, a By-person breakdown, and an item delta since the last digest (completed / added / removed / reopened). Working week is Sun-Thu. Scheduled DM-SprintDigest weekly Sundays 09:00 IST; idempotency keyed on iterationId + Sunday week-start; best-effort ADO via az token with graceful no-sprint / zero-item handling; joke + signature; never modifies ADO.

skills.name: email-investigation
triggers: send analysis with the fancy UI
send the investigation we just discussed
skills.summary: Investigation/RCA-flavored email composer: dark hero banner, TL;DR card, 4-stat grid, narrative cards with callouts, numbered priority-chipped recommendation cards, joke + signature. Single source of truth for the look: .copilot/skills/_shared/investigation-email.ps1 (reusable from any skill). Sends via Outlook COM (same recipe as email-team).

skills.name: post-to-teams
triggers: post the daily report to teams

skills.name: genz-ask
skills.status_note: Voice is still being fine-tuned — `וש`-density / emoji count / opener / joke mass calibrate as Nir reacts to drafts. Treat output as a starting point, expect to nudge.
skills.summary: Prank-flavored composer: drafts a Hebrew task assignment in the Your Team WhatsApp register dialed up to 11 (וש-suffix gimmick on nouns like תור→תורוש, plus טובות / ביוש / יש אותך), then routes through email-team / whatsapp / post-to-teams. Voice only — never modifies ADO items, no scheduled fires.

skills.name: plus-nirvana
skills.summary: Hand-off pattern: when Nir tags a Sent reply with the literal token `+Nirvana` (in subject or body), Nirvana picks it up from Sent Items, ReplyAll's the original recipients on Nir's behalf with a polite ack ("Nir and I will pick this up and circle back"), creates a PT-NNN in personal-todos and references it inline, ends with a joke, and stamps the Sent item with `NirvanaPlusProcessed` for idempotency. Audience guardrail: all recipients must be @microsoft.com. Polled every 5 min by DM-PlusNirvana; also on-demand.

skills.name: pr-review-request
triggers: ask team to review new PRs
skills.summary: Whenever a direct report (or Nir himself) opens a NEW pull request, post a 'please review' message to the team's Teams channel via the post-to-teams Outlook -> Power Automate flow. Watches Nir + every direct in directs-context.json (auto-refreshed, so new directs are covered automatically), querying each member's ACTIVE PRs. A baseline timestamp captured on first run means it only fires for PRs created from now onward (no backfill); non-draft only; idempotent via state/posted.json (one Teams post per PR). Teams posts carry no joke/signature per convention. Polled every 5 min by DM-PrReviewRequest; also on-demand with -DryRun/-Force/-ResetBaseline.

skills.name: pr-review-assistant
skills.status_note: First end-to-end automation that auto-posts content into other people's PRs in ADO. Comment voice / signal-to-noise / severity calibration all need real-world tuning. Expect to nudge as Nir sees what lands.
skills.summary: Reviews one ADO PR end-to-end: fetches diff, runs code-review sub-agent (Opus 4.8), posts comments at all four severity tiers ([Blocker]/[Concern]/[Suggestion]/[Nit]) directly to ADO, writes per-iteration report, emails Nir a one-pager. On-demand ONLY via 'review PR <id>' — the DM-PrReviewAssistant scheduled scan is disabled, so nothing is reviewed automatically. Idempotency via state/seen.json keyed on (pr-id, iteration-id).

skills.name: pr-team-stats
skills.summary: Generates a weekly/day-by-day PR report for your directs + you, including completion time, first-review delay, and reviewer counts. Supports an optional Your Team reviewer filter.

skills.name: inbox-watch
skills.status_note: Auto-reply behavior is still being fine-tuned — realism filter, answer-vs-defer classification, voice, and when to invoke sub-skills (codebase / team-personas / sprint-report-daily in read-only mode) all calibrate as Nir reacts to outbound replies. Treat sent replies as drafts Nirvana shipped; expect to nudge / correct.

skills.name: team-vacation-watch
skills.summary: Daily watcher over the shared team calendar. Reads each member's Outlook free/busy (read-only) to detect vacations, upserts a managed <!-- nirvana:vacation-status --> block in each persona file, and auto-posts a warm 'welcome back' to the Your Team Teams channel via post-to-teams when someone returns - idempotent once per person per return (pending->sent ledger in state/welcomed.json, snapshot in state/vacation-status.json). Only welcomes back when the absence cost >=2 Israel working days (Sun-Thu), so weekend-only or single-working-day (e.g. Thu+Fri+Sat) absences are skipped silently; the post uses a qualitative length phrase (short/long, no raw dates) plus a 'what you missed' brief sourced ONLY from team pull requests (never email/Teams). Israel-local dates, inclusive vacation end (return = end+1), max_late_welcome_days=2, min_working_days_for_welcome=2, conservative first-run (explicit returned_today only). Scheduled task DM-TeamVacationWatch runs daily 08:00 IST + every 10 min for 12h; on-demand with -DryRun/-Force/-AsOfDate.

skills.name: whatsapp
triggers: what did X say on whatsapp

skills.name: pilates
triggers: show me my upcoming pilates registrations
skills.summary: auto-books Reformer Pilates via direct Arbox API; per-slot scheduled tasks fire 10s before registration opens, poll-and-book, then email a confirmation.

skills.name: semester-plan-report
skills.summary: Bi-weekly DM semester-plan dashboard (Apr 1 - Sep 30 window, Feature + PBI level, Semester Pulse intro). Refreshes ADO state every run via WIQL + workitemsbatch, renders Clawpilot-themed single-file HTML, emails VP / A Peer / Your Manager (Nir on CC). Scheduled task DM-SemesterPlanReport runs every Thursday 16:00 IST; runner self-gates to fire only within 3 days of the current iteration finishDate so it lands at sprint close.

skills.name: team-agenda
triggers: track this for next team meeting
send the team agenda reminder now
skills.summary: Team Open Discussions agenda tracker. Persists open items at reports/team-agenda/open-discussions.md (markdown, TA-NNN IDs). Two weekly reminders: DM-TeamAgendaReminder Mondays 08:00 IST emails Nir the open list; DM-TeamMeetingReminder Tuesdays 14:00 IST (30 min before the recurring 'Team Meeting' at 14:30) emails the team (team@) the open list, runtime-confirming the meeting exists in Outlook before sending. Supports add/list/close/remind modes.

skills.name: risk-watch
skills.summary: Living delivery-risk register (RK-NNN) at reports/risks/register.md, distinct from team-agenda (discussion) and personal-todos (actions). Each risk carries a RAG level (Risk: Red/Amber/Green) separate from its Open/Closed lifecycle, plus Owner, Area, Why-at-risk, Mitigation, Next-checkpoint, and Linked-ADO. Weekly pulse DM-RiskWatchPulse (Sundays 08:45 IST) emails Nir the open Red + Amber risks with overdue checkpoints flagged and sorted first; Green omitted with a count; always sends (even all-green). Add via the mandatory add-item.py helper. ISO-week idempotency; joke + signature; never modifies ADO.

skills.name: one-on-one-agenda
skills.summary: Per-person 1:1 talking-point tracker (ON-NNN). One markdown file per partner at reports/one-on-ones/<slug>.md (e.g. Your Manager.md, vp.md). Same item shape as team-agenda (Discussion / Follow-up). Built-in scheduled task DM-OneOnOneAgenda polls every 5 min and fires one email to Nir 30 min before any 1:1 whose subject matches a known person with open ON-NNN items — auto-extends to new partners as new files are added. Add items via the mandatory add-item.py helper.

skills.name: reminders
skills.summary: Nirvana-as-personal-assistant reminder service. Two kinds: meeting-bound (fires N min before/after a meeting whose subject matches a substring) or absolute (fires at a fixed ISO time). Source of truth at reports/reminders/reminders.md (RM-NNN). Single polling scheduled task DM-Reminders runs every 5 min 24/7, re-resolves meeting times each tick so reminders follow if a meeting moves.

skills.name: nirvana-site
skills.summary: Self-contained Nirvana Explorer single-file HTML (reports/site/nirvana.html) for browsing every skill, persona, workspace artifact, scheduled task, and convention in one place. Clawpilot-themed, light/dark toggle, sidebar search, per-skill Run panel (parameters parsed from the entrypoint .ps1, recent runs from reports/<skill>/ + matching reports/logs/) with inline file preview. Rebuilt nightly by DM-NirvanaSiteBuild (06:00 IST).

skills.name: personal-todos
triggers: send my daily todo email now
remind me of my todos now
skills.summary: Nir's private todo list (PT-NNN). Despite the 'personal-' name prefix, this is a WORK tool — the list holds both work and personal-life categories. Conversational add via chat, persistent markdown at reports/personal-todos/todos.md. Daily 07:00 IST HTML reminder DM-PersonalTodosDaily with 3-5 auto-suggestions from inbox-watch / 1:1 prep / PR queue / milestones. Light gamification: weekly count only.

skills.name: daily-capture
skills.summary: Once-a-day (18:00 IST) replacement for Cowork's OneDrive feed. Produces the daily activity summary (DailySummary_<date>.md for Nirvana/DailySummary, ingested by DM-DailySummaryImport) and the per-direct-report 24h capture (one .md per report under Nirvana/Personas/<date>). Reads via WorkIQ (summarizes; personas bodies are paraphrased, not verbatim) inside copilot subprocesses; the runner owns preflight, staging, validation, atomic publish to OneDrive, per-phase/per-person state, and the single signed summary email. Scheduled by DM-DailyCapture (execution_time_limit PT45M).

skills.name: team-brief
triggers: what did the team do today
skills.summary: Two fancy Nir-only digest emails about what the direct-report team did, rendered with the investigation-email look (dark hero / TL;DR / stat-grid / per-person cards). DAILY mode summarizes one day's activity (scheduled DM-TeamBriefDaily 18:30 IST, after the 18:00 DM-DailyCapture lands); WEEKLY mode rolls up the Sun-Thu work week (scheduled DM-TeamWeeklyHighlights Thursday 17:00 IST). Data comes from reports/directs-scope/directs-context.json (recent PRs as author/reviewer, active work items, wins) plus the per-person '## Daily observations' lines in team-personas/people/*.md. Run via 'run-team-brief.ps1 -Mode daily|weekly [-Date] [-Force] [-DryRun] [-NoEmail]'. IST DateTimeOffset windows (DST-correct); PRs filtered honestly by created-in-window since there is no completed timestamp; all data HTML-encoded; idempotent JSON state (state/daily-sent.json, state/weekly-sent.json) advanced only on a successful send so missed days backfill on resume (Cloud PC weekend suspends); joke + signature; reads only, never modifies ADO or OneDrive.

skills.name: personal-todos-import
skills.summary: Auto-imports Outlook tasks from the '🔎 Nirvana TODO' list into personal-todos (PT-NNN), then marks the Outlook task complete with [PT-NNN] prefixed in the subject. Polled by scheduled task DM-PersonalTodosImport every 5 min, 24/7. Set-and-forget bridge — no chat triggers.

skills.name: logs-cleanup
skills.summary: Generic, flow-agnostic pruner for the runtime-only (gitignored) reports/logs folder so it doesn't grow unbounded. Deletes *.log files older than the retention window (config logs.retention_days, default 14) but always keeps the newest N per flow prefix (logs.keep_min_per_prefix, default 5); also age-prunes non-.log scratch debris (temp-*.py, stray *.json/*.ps1) when -IncludeScratch (default on). A grace window (logs.grace_hours, default 6) never touches actively-appending logs; refuses to run unless $LogDir resolves exactly to <agent-root>/reports/logs. Covers every current AND future skill automatically. Scheduled task DM-LogsCleanup runs daily 05:30 IST; on-demand with -DryRun.
